nasb.text: and we took their land and gave it as an inheritance to the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of the Manassites.

esv.text: We took their land and gave it for an inheritance to the Reubenites, the Gadites, and the half-tribe of the Manassites.

cnv.text: 奪取了他們的地，分給流本人、迦得人和瑪拿西半個支派作產業。

ccb.text: 并将占领的土地分给吕便支派、迦得支派和玛拿西半个支派作产业。
